sample.query: How do I export my invoices as CSV?
sample.answer: You can export invoices from the billing page.
retrieved_docs: Billing > Invoices > Export lets you download invoices as CSV or PDF. Bulk export is available on Pro plans.

conversation_history.content: Hi, I need help with billing.

evidence.completeness: Answer omits the concrete path (Billing > Invoices > Export) and the Pro-plan bulk-export caveat.

top_issues.description: Answer is vague; misses the exact export path and plan caveat.
top_issues.recommendation: Return the full Billing > Invoices > Export steps.

summary: HelpDeskAI v1: correct but incomplete billing answer.
